Our Story Connect Reserve

Supported by
Logo by

The Chef

Chef
Jerry Tan

Born and raised in Singapore, Jerry's obsession with food led him to Le Cordon Bleu Paris — where he spent a year immersed in French cuisine and pastry. He brought that precision home, and made it entirely his own.

The Philosophy
"Where every detail is made by hand — from the handcrafted sourdough bread to the freshly made pasta."

Twelve seats. One chef. Nothing outsourced.
Every sauce, every stock, every component — made from scratch. That's not a selling point. It's the only way Jerry knows how to cook.

Ingredients first. Always

We follow the harvest, not the calendar.

Grown by hand. From her garden to your plate.

Sourced from the market at dawn. Chosen by the same hands that cook it.

Premium catch, never frozen. Because you deserve the best of what the sea offers.

Your Details

Terms & Conditions

• A 50% deposit is required to secure your reservation. Cancellations made more than 3 days in advance will receive a full refund. For cancellations within 3 days, the 50% deposit may be retained unless we are able to accommodate another party of the same size for the reserved time.

• No-shows or parties arriving later than 15 minutes may forfeit their 50% deposit, unless prior notice has been given via WhatsApp at least 24 hours before the reservation.

• As part of our commitment to offering a refined and tranquil environment, we regret that we are unable to cater to children under 12 years old. Children under 7 are not permitted on the premises.

• To ensure a smooth dining experience for all guests, we kindly ask that your party arrives 10 minutes prior to your reservation time.

• To maintain food safety standards, outside food is not permitted.

• We strive to provide a pleasant environment for all guests. We reserve the right to refuse service to individuals whose behaviour affects the comfort of others.

• Given the advance preparation of our menu, modifications cannot be made on the day of your reservation. We kindly request that all dietary requirements be communicated during booking.

• For the comfort of all guests, pets are not allowed in the dining area.

• In the event of unforeseen circumstances affecting your reservation, we will contact you promptly and offer alternatives to accommodate your party.

• To maintain the refined ambiance of our dining room, we kindly request that guests adhere to a smart-casual dress code.

• Upon confirmation of your reservation via WhatsApp, our team will provide payment instructions for the 50% deposit. Kindly complete the deposit payment within 24 hours to secure your booking.

Thank you 🙏

Chef Jerry will reach out via WhatsApp shortly to confirm your booking. We look forward to hosting you.

Terms & Conditions

• A 50% deposit is required to secure your event. Cancellations made more than 3 days in advance will receive a full refund. For cancellations within 3 days, the 50% deposit may be retained unless we are able to accommodate another party of the same size for the reserved time.

• No-shows or parties arriving later than 15 minutes may forfeit their 50% deposit, unless prior notice has been given via WhatsApp at least 24 hours before the event.

• As part of our commitment to offering a refined and tranquil environment, we regret that we are unable to cater to children under 12 years old. Children under 7 are not permitted on the premises.

• To ensure a smooth experience for all guests, we kindly ask that your party arrives 10 minutes prior to your reservation time.

• To maintain food safety standards, outside food is not permitted.

• We strive to provide a pleasant environment for all guests. We reserve the right to refuse service to individuals whose behaviour affects the comfort of others.

• Given the advance preparation of our menu, modifications cannot be made on the day of your event. We kindly request that all dietary requirements be communicated during booking.

• For the comfort of all guests, pets are not allowed in the dining area.

• In the event of unforeseen circumstances affecting your booking, we will contact you promptly and offer alternatives to accommodate your party.

• To maintain the refined ambiance of our dining room, we kindly request that guests adhere to a smart-casual dress code.

• Upon confirmation of your event via WhatsApp, our team will provide payment instructions for the 50% deposit. Kindly complete the deposit payment within 24 hours to secure your booking.
